Polymind

Compare AI Models Like a Pro

Connect multiple AI models and let them debate or vote to find the best answers. Select your models, choose a mode, and submit your prompt.

30+ Models
Live Debate Flow
Selected: 0
1
Connect OpenRouter
Add your OpenRouter API key to load and run models.

Get your API key from openrouter.ai/keys

2
Select Models
Pick at least two models to compare debate or voting outcomes.

Please connect your OpenRouter API key first.

3
Choose Mode
Use Debate for collaboration or Voting for judged selection.
4
Enter Your Prompt
Ask your question and start the selected workflow.
0 models
No mode selected
0 chars

Tip: Ctrl/Cmd + Enter to run

Polymind is open source. Use your own OpenRouter API key. No data is stored on any server.
